And even Vins and I who are physically fit are also catching our breaths when walking in this part of Central. So if there are instances that you feel are just close by, consider taking public transportation. Especially if you have companions who can't walk uphill for a long time. There are other travelers who leave their passports at the hotel because they're worried they'll lose it or get it wet when it rains, but in most countries, it's often best practice to bring your passport when leaving your hotel.
